ddls:
CREATE TABLE "programs" (
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each program */,
  "program_name" TEXT /* Name of the funding program */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the program */,
  "program_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the program */,
  "program_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the program */,
  "program_status" TEXT /* Current status of the program (e.g., active, completed, pending) */,
  "program_manager_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user ID of the program manager */,
  "program_budget_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the initial budget ID for the program */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_programs_program_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_manager_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_programs_program_budget_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_budget_id") REFERENCES budgets ("budget_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "budgets" (
  "budget_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each budget entry */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the program associated with the budget */,
  "prior_year_amount" REAL /* Amount allocated in the prior year */,
  "current_amount" REAL /* Current amount allocated */,
  "new_fte_count" INTEGER /* Number of new FTEs requested */,
  "timeframe" TEXT /* Timeframe for the budget allocation */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Source of the funding (e.g., federal, state, local) */,
  "funding_type" TEXT /* Type of funding (e.g., grant, allocation, loan) */,
  "projected_amount" REAL /* Projected amount for future allocations */,
  "budget_status" TEXT /* Status of the budget (e.g., approved, pending, denied) */,
  "created_by_user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user ID who created the budget entry */,
  "last_modified_by_user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user ID who last modified the budget entry */,
  "created_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the budget entry was created */,
  "last_modified_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the budget entry was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("budget_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_budgets_created_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("created_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_budgets_last_modified_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_budgets_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES programs ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "expenditures" (
  "expenditure_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each expenditure record */,
  "budget_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the budget associated with the expenditure */,
  "amount_spent" REAL /* Amount spent from the budget */,
  "expenditure_date" TEXT /* Date of the expenditure */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the expenditure */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the expenditure (e.g., supplies, salaries, travel) */,
  "vendor_name" TEXT /* Name of the vendor or service provider */,
  "invoice_number" TEXT /* Invoice number for the expenditure */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., check, wire transfer, credit card) */,
  "approval_status" TEXT /* Approval status of the expenditure (e.g., approved, pending, denied) */,
  "approved_by_user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user ID who approved the expenditure */,
  "approved_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the expenditure was approved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("expenditure_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_expenditures_approved_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_expenditures_budget_id FOREIGN KEY ("budget_id") REFERENCES budgets ("budget_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "personnel" (
  "personnel_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each personnel record */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the program associated with the personnel */,
  "fte_count" INTEGER /* Full-time equivalent count for the personnel allocation */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the personnel */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the personnel allocation */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the personnel allocation */,
  "employee_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the employee (e.g., employee number) */,
  "employee_name" TEXT /* Name of the employee */,
  "employee_email" TEXT /* Email address of the employee */,
  "employee_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the employee */,
  "employee_role_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the employee's role */,
  "employee_status" TEXT /* Status of the employee (e.g., active, on leave, terminated) */,
  "hired_by_user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user ID who hired the employee */,
  "last_modified_by_user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user ID who last modified the personnel record */,
  "created_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the personnel record was created */,
  "last_modified_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the personnel record was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("personnel_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_personnel_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES programs ("program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_personnel_last_modified_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_personnel_hired_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("hired_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, program manager) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or division the user belongs to */,
  "created_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was created */,
  "last_modified_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was last modified */,
  "last_login_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who made the change */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action taken (e.g., insert, update, delete) */,
  "table_name" TEXT /* Name of the table where the change occurred */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the change was made */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the action was performed */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client that performed the action */,
  "action_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the action taken */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
